input.content:
# Markdown Parsing Heuristics for Slide Generation

---


# Slide Break Detection
- Horizontal rules (`---`) or triple dashes separate slides
- Consistent use of these delimiters ensures clean slide splits
- Some tools support vertical slides with double delimiters or custom regex
- Avoid extra spaces or line breaks around delimiters for accurate parsing

---


# Header Levels as Slide Titles & Structure
- Top-level headers (#) often become slide titles or section headers
- Lower-level headers (##, ###) can create subsections or nested slides
- Parsing heuristics prioritize headers to organize content hierarchy
- Missing headers may cause content to merge into a single slide

---


# Content Density & Formatting Heuristics
- Lists, code blocks, and images parsed to maintain formatting on slides
- Some converters auto-scale font size or split dense content into multiple slides
- Inline formatting (bold, italics) recognized via standard Markdown syntax
- Embedded HTML or special syntax may require specific parser support
